product: OpenAI GPT 5 models are now generally available in Mosaic AI Model Serving
tagline: The OpenAI GPT 5, GPT 5 mini and GPT 5 nano models are now generally available in Mosaic AI Model Serving.
what_it_does: The OpenAI GPT 5, GPT 5 mini and GPT 5 nano models are now generally available in Mosaic AI Model Serving. This article describes the state of the art open models that are supported by Databricks Foundation Model APIs. note See Supported foundation models on Model Serving for region availability of these models and the supported feature areas.
why_it_matters: It delivers improved performance on complex tasks with enhanced accuracy and more deliberate scaffolded reasoning.
plain_summary: The OpenAI GPT 5, GPT 5 mini and GPT 5 nano models are now generally available in Mosaic AI Model Serving. This article describes the state of the art open models that are supported by Databricks Foundation Model APIs.
key_takeaway: The OpenAI GPT 5, GPT 5 mini and GPT 5 nano models are now generally available in Mosaic AI Model Serving.
